name: Go-Zero
description: Go-Zero — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Web & RPC Framework.

seo.title: Go-Zero Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Go-Zero offers custom pricing.

cons: Limited customization for complex business logic
